title: solanecio goetzei
intro: Solanecio goetzei, also known as the Goetze's solanecio, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solanecio goetzei include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, Solanecio goetzei is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
